This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (inside ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (inside ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PickupFromOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (on ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (on ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (inside ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (inside ?o ?r)))
  )

    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r) (handempty))

    :action OpenObject

    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (inside ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (inside ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PickupFromOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (on ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (on ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (inside ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (inside ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PickupFromOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (on ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObjectOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (on ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action PutObjectInside
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o) (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (inside ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )

    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (inside ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (on ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (inside ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PickupFromOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (on ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObjectOn
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (on ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action PutObjectInside
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o) (opened ?r))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (inside ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (on ?o ?r))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (inside ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)

  )

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

This is previous domain file: 
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - object)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action UseObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
3. close a receptacle
    :action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
4. take an object from another receptacle
    :action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

10. slice an object using a sharp object
    :action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)

    This may involve more than simply transferring it from one place to another.

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )

    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )

    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )

    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

    :action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )

    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

    :action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (at ?from)
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )

    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :parameters (?r - receptacle)

    :action PickupObject

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject

    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (heated ?o - object)
    (cleaned ?o - object)
    (cooled ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)
    :precondition (holding ?o)
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :action GotoLocation

    :action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
3. close a receptacle
    :action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
4. take an object from another receptacle
    :action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    :action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)

10. slice an object using a sharp object
    :action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)

You must go to a receptacle first in order to use/open it or take/put objects from/on it.

1. Always searching for the aim Object first!!!
