(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (isLamp ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (isLamp ?o))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )
)

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
    microwaveReceptacle sinkbasinReceptacle fridgeReceptacle - receptacle
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (isLamp ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (isLamp ?o))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
  (:action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (heated ?o)
  )
  (:action CleanObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cleaned ?o)
  )
  (:action CoolObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (cooled ?o)
  )

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (isLamp ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (isLamp ?o))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

    :action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
3. close a receptacle
    :action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
4. take an object from another receptacle
    :action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    :action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)

    :action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object)

    :action HeatObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - microwaveReceptacle)
8. clean an object using a receptacle

    :parameters (?o - object ?r - sinkbasinReceptacle)
9. cool an object using a receptacle

    :parameters (?o - object ?r - fridgeReceptacle)
10. slice an object using a sharp object
    :action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)

You must go to a receptacle first in order to use/open it or take/put objects from/on it.

The process involves two main stages:

1. Always searching for the aim Object first!!!
    In this stage, your goal is to go to and may need to open new, unvisited recepatacles until you find the object mentioned in the task. Some receptacles cannot be opened so you can directly see what objects after you go to that receptacle.

    You can only use the GotoLocation action to travel to a new location and the OpenObject action (if the receptacle is closed) to verify whether it contains the target object.

Remember your goal is You arrive at bed 1. On the bed 1, you see a book 3, a book 2, a book 1, a pillow 2, and a pillow 1.. Based on different adjectives, you may need to perform different actions for the object in different ways.

    This may involve more than simply transferring it from one place to another.
    For example: You might examine the object or a nearby receptacle to gather information. You may need to use another tool or device (like a lamp or a switch). Some tasks require you to slice, heat, cool, or clean the object using an appropriate receptacle (e.g., microwave, sink, fridge).

    If necessary, use the PickupObject action to retrieve the item, and the GotoLocation action to move to the correct place.
    Then, apply the object in a purposeful way — not just move it — but interact with the environment to fulfill the task’s actual goal.

    Hint: 
    1. If you want to heat, clean, and cool an object, after you go to that aim receptacle, do not put the object in the receptacle but do the action directly. For example, go to fridge, then cool the object with receptacle.

In summary, the first stage is all about finding the object—this might involve going to an unvisited receptacle and opening it if necessary.

1. some receptacles have numbers in their names. Always keep them as they are. For example, "towelholder1" should not be changed to "towelholder".

3. Do not enter stage 2 when not finishing stage 1.

(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (isLamp ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (isLamp ?o))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)

Generated df and pf:
(define (domain exploration_domain)
  (:requirements :strips :typing :negative-preconditions)
  (:types
    receptacle object - thing
    sharpObject - object
  )
  (:predicates
    (at ?r - receptacle)
    (visited ?r - receptacle)
    (opened ?r - receptacle)
    (handempty)
    (holding ?o - object)
    (at-object ?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    (sliced ?o - object)
    (used ?o - object)
    (isLamp ?o - object)
  )
  (:action GotoLocation
    :parameters (?from - receptacle ?to - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?from) (not (at ?to)))
    :effect (and (not (at ?from)) (at ?to) (visited ?to))
  )
  (:action OpenObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (not (opened ?r)))
    :effect (opened ?r)
  )
  (:action CloseObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (opened ?r))
    :effect (not (opened ?r))
  )
  (:action PickupObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (handempty))
    :effect (and (holding ?o) (not (handempty)) (not (at-object ?o ?r)))
  )
  (:action PutObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (holding ?o))
    :effect (and (not (holding ?o)) (handempty) (at-object ?o ?r))
  )
  (:action useObject
    :parameters (?o - object ?r - receptacle)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?o ?r) (isLamp ?o))
    :effect (used ?o)
  )
  (:action SliceObject
    :parameters (?r - receptacle ?co - object ?sharp_o - sharpObject)
    :precondition (and (at ?r) (at-object ?co ?r) (holding ?sharp_o))
    :effect (sliced ?co)
  )
)
